scenario: Head of household: standard deduction $23,625 with one qualifying child — CTC $2,200 (OBBBA P.L. 119-21) reduces tax from $2,225 to $25; EITC applies at $45,000 HOH income with 1 qualifying child
source: IRS Pub 17 TY2025 (pre-OBBBA example); updated for OBBBA §70001 CTC increase to $2,200/child (P.L. 119-21, July 4, 2025); EITC per IRC §32 at $45,000 HOH earned income with 1 qualifying child
